ddls:
CREATE TABLE "volcanoes" (
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volcano */,
  "volcano_name" TEXT /* Name of the volcano */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the volcano */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the volcano */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the volcano */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the volcano */,
  "volcano_type" TEXT /* Type of volcano */,
  "last_eruption_date" TEXT /* Date of the last eruption */,
  "volcano_status" TEXT /* Current status of the volcano */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volcano_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eruptions" (
  "eruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eruption */,
  "volcano_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volcano that erupted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the eruption */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the eruption */,
  "eruption_type" TEXT /* Type of eruption */,
  "eruption_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the eruption */,
  "eruption_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the eruption */,
  "eruption_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the eruption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eruptions_volcano_id FOREIGN KEY ("volcano_id") REFERENCES volcanoes ("volcano_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deep_volcanic_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "eruption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the eruption associated with the activity */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being measured */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the deep volcanic activity */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observation notes for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deep_volcanic_activity_eruption_id FOREIGN KEY ("eruption_id") REFERENCES eruptions ("eruption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shallow_volcanic_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "eruption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the eruption associated with the activity */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being measured */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the shallow volcanic activity */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observation notes for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shallow_volcanic_activity_eruption_id FOREIGN KEY ("eruption_id") REFERENCES eruptions ("eruption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tectonic_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "eruption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the eruption associated with the activity */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being measured */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the tectonic activity */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observation notes for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tectonic_activity_eruption_id FOREIGN KEY ("eruption_id") REFERENCES eruptions ("eruption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multiphase_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "eruption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the eruption associated with the activity */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being measured */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the multiphase activity */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observation notes for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multiphase_activity_eruption_id FOREIGN KEY ("eruption_id") REFERENCES eruptions ("eruption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation record */,
  "eruption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the eruption associated with the observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observation notes */,
  "observation_category" TEXT /* Category of the observation */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_eruption_id FOREIGN KEY ("eruption_id") REFERENCES eruptions ("eruption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
